text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
271 
ORG_NPI_NUM 
LABEL: 
Organization (or group) NPI Number 
DESCRIPTION: The National Provider Identifier (NPI) of the organization or group practice. 
SHORT NAME: ORGNPINM 
LONG NAME: ORG_NPI_NUM 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
10 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
On an institutional claim, this is the NPI number assigned to uniquely identify the institutional provider
